title: Phase 162 — Runtime Handoff Completion + Snapshot Delivery v1
purpose: Harden terminal handoff delivery, snapshot surfacing, stale handoff rejection, and immediate BLOCKED stop behavior before the full live loop test.
acceptanceCriteria: CURRENT_CHATGPT_HANDOFF.md is written for terminal statuses.
Terminal BLOCKED and QA_BLOCKED statuses exit nonzero.
Snapshots and evidence paths are attached to handoffs.
Newest non-stale handoff after the active run timestamp is selected.
PASS_GUARANTEED enables safe auto-approval only when owner boundary triggers are false.
QA-approved auto-merge wording is distinct from owner-approved merge wording.
Verifier includes pass and fail sample cases.
